query:
UPDATE tagging_services ts
               SET position = ord.pos
               FROM (
                   SELECT unnest($1::uuid[]) AS id,
                          unnest($3::int[])  AS pos
               ) AS ord
               WHERE ts.id = ord.id
                 AND ts.owner_id = $2
                 AND ts.service_type <> 'shared_tag_mapping'::service_type
               RETURNING ts.id
